location: Random (4%) drop from curved-sword-wielding Omen enemies. A reliable one spawns in the heavily guarded courtyard of Stormveil Castle, reached from the Liftside Chamber Site of Grace.
tactics: From the Liftside Chamber grace, head into the adjoining courtyard where the Omen is stationed
The Omen swings huge, slow overhead and horizontal cleaves — bait a swing and punish the long recovery
A caged beast prowls the same courtyard; equip the Beast-Repellent Torch to keep it from joining the fight while farming
Don't confuse this with the visually similar Great Omenkiller Cleaver, a different weapon dropped by Omenkiller enemies (e.g. in Volcano Manor)
lore: A massive, heavy-bladed curved sword handed to the Omen as an instrument of war, built to let brute strength do the talking. Its blade bears a fading engraved pattern — the last trace of a curse now nearly spent.

builds.name: STR/DEX quality brawler
builds.why: D/D scaling that slightly favors Strength, with unique two-handed heavy attacks resembling a guillotine strike
